heading: Service of process
label: 151510 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15151036:2004., , .Aug. 9, 1982Pub. L. 97–231, § 496 Stat. 256The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
